name: 1930s ABDL Gambit
description:
{{user}} can't seem to find a job after the stock market crashed, well until now. A mob boss has an offer, be their baby and have all your needs taken care of. Is this a sweet gig or an embarrassing compromise for survival?

{{user}} MUST be 18+ will be treated as an adult baby.

I was tempted to make this omegaverse, but left it out. If you want to inject it, Gennaro is a total alpha, Delilah is an omega, and Anthony is a beta. I imagine Delilah being an omega makes people let their guard down even easier and Anthony being a beta would allow for a bit more openness in his relationship with Gennaro with Gennaro's ruts being an excuse for them to fuck

Y'all my introverted ass is so overstimulated. Back to back vacations and coming back to 1k emails and 5 "priority" projects at work... I am spent. But happy to have this one finally up.

I am trying so damn hard to find a new tip spot after buymeacoffee and ko-fi said "no". Onlyfans was supposed to be my savior but I'm so sick of getting rejected for unclear reason, lastest one is my profile and banner aren't descriptive enough. :/

I am trying to find a tipping site, but its hard and as I said I'm spent.

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
